# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Resolved the pending pid-file race in src/cli/run.rs for kill_tracked_descendant_processes_survives_parent_exit. The test now keeps polling until descendant.pid is readable and parses as a valid u32 PID before it proceeds, covering the shell-redirection window where the file exists but is still empty. No new #[ignore] attributes were added.",

      "description": "Updated the readiness loop to parse the pid contents inside the bounded polling loop instead of parsing once after file creation/readability.",
